keyEvents.text: Redouane Halhal (Morocco) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Morocco. Soufiane Rahimi replaces Ismael Saibari because of an injury.
Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) is shown the yellow card.
Richie Laryea (Canada) is shown the yellow card.
Jonathan David (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Bilal El Khannouss (Morocco) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Luc De Fougerolles (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Canada 0, Morocco 1. Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Achraf Hakimi following a set piece situation.
Substitution, Morocco. Chemsdine Talbi replaces Bilal El Khannouss.
Substitution, Morocco. Sofyan Amrabat replaces Ayyoub Bouaddi.
Substitution, Canada. Cyle Larin replaces Tani Oluwaseyi.
Cyle Larin (Canada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Canada. Promise David replaces Ali Ahmed.
Substitution, Canada. Jacob Shaffelburg replaces Richie Laryea.
Goal! Canada 0, Morocco 2. Azzedine Ounahi (Morocco) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Brahim Díaz following a fast break.
Substitution, Morocco. Marwane Saadane replaces Issa Diop.
Substitution, Morocco. Samir El Mourabet replaces Azzedine Ounahi.
Substitution, Canada. Jonathan Osorio replaces Niko Sigur.
Substitution, Canada. Jayden Nelson replaces Tajon Buchanan.
Goal! Canada 0, Morocco 3. Soufiane Rahimi (Morocco) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Brahim Díaz following a fast break.
Bradley Barcola (France) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
